name: GDCoach AI
description: Personalized AI coaching for Geometry Dash. Analyzes your play session and delivers targeted feedback on deaths, gamemode skills, and practice recommendations.

demon-list-mode.name: Demon List Mode
demon-list-mode.description: Completely disables the AI Coach button and all UI hooks when active. Enable this before recording official Demon List attempts to guarantee a clean, unmodified run.

max-tokens.name: AI Token Limit
max-tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens the AI is allowed to generate per response. Lower values are faster and cheaper; higher values allow more detailed coaching. Changes take effect immediately on the next request.

delete-data-button.name: Delete Stored Data
delete-data-button.description: Open the data deletion menu to selectively remove saved chat histories and session data.
